title: quercus × hillii
intro: Quercus × hillii, also known as Hill's oak or Hill's white oak, is a hybrid species of oak tree that is native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds, that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus × hillii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparation of Quercus × hillii typically involves using its leaves, bark, or extract in teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
